vulnerabilities.title: Exposed Microsoft RPC Endpoint Mapper
vulnerabilities.description: MSRPC (Port 135) is visible to network probes. Allows remote attackers to enumerate DCOM interface bindings.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Restrict Port 135 via Windows Firewall to trusted administrative IP subnets.

vulnerabilities.title: EternalBlue / SMBv1 Remote Code Execution Risk
vulnerabilities.description: Port 445 (SMB) is exposed. If running unpatched SMBv1, host is susceptible to remote code execution (EternalBlue).
vulnerabilities.remediation: Disable SMBv1 and enforce SMB signing via Group Policy.
